transcript: Speaker A: Rojuki 6 gantalu reels chustunnav kada, ade samayam SpeakX app use chesunte ippudu fluent ga English matladunu. Nenu kuda rojanta reels chustu undedanni, naa pakkana unna vallu munduku vellipoyaru, nenu matram akkade aagipoyanu. Mee time gurinchi alochinchandi. Phone lo chala nerchukovachu. Ee SpeakX app ne chudandi. Indulo AI English teacher tho matladutu nenu kevalam 2 vaarallo fluent ga English matladadam nerchukunnanu. Ippudu nenu prati chota high-class English matladagulugutunnanu. Andaru nannu respect istunnanu. Mee life ni meeru decide cheskondi. Rojanta reels chustu time waste cheyala, leka SpeakX app use chesi samajam lo respect sampadinchala. [Speaker A: You watch reels for 6 hours a day, right? If you had used the SpeakX app instead, you would speak fluent English by now. I also wasted time on reels while others progressed. Think about your time; you can learn a lot on your phone. Look at this SpeakX app. By practicing with its AI English teacher, I learned fluent English in just 2 weeks. Now I speak high-class English everywhere and earn respect. Decide your life: waste time on reels or earn respect with SpeakX.]

summary: The presenter urges viewers to stop wasting hours scrolling through social media reels and instead use that time productively to learn English. She shares her personal success story of becoming fluent in just two weeks using the SpeakX AI learning app. The ad concludes by asking viewers to choose between wasting time or gaining social respect through learning.
